titles.title: Peace on Earth (Into darkness comes a light)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Into darkness comes a light, Into silence a baby's cry The birth of freedom, The death of fear In a manger Christ is here

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let there be peace on earth Let there be peace on earth Long awaited love Heaven's come for us Let there be peace on earth

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All division may it cease, Every worry may it flee, A weary heart finds A thrill of hope The world rejoices We're not alone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Joy to the world, The Lord is come Let earth receive her King Let every heart prepare Him room And heaven and nature sing

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Peace on earth Peace on earth
